title: blechnum × aggregatum
intro: Blechnum × aggregatum, also known as the hybrid fern or the water fern, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Blechnum and the Diplolepidea genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a natural antiseptic. The health benefits of Blechnum × aggregatum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying the fronds and leaves, then using them in teas, infusions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
